title: [GVN] Restore the NumGVNInstr metric
author: alanzhao1
description: The NumGVNInstr metric counts the number of instructions deleted by the GVN pass. #131753 changed where the instructions were deleted in the pass, but that PR did not update the NumGVNInstr metric whenever instructions were deleted. This PR fixes that bug by updating NumGVNInstr whenever `removeInstruction(...)` is called.

tests.test_body:
define i32 @main() {
block1:
  %z1 = bitcast i32 0 to i32
  br label %block2

block2:                                           ; preds = %block1
  %z2 = bitcast i32 0 to i32
  ret i32 %z2
}

comments.author: aeubanks
comments.body: if we care enough to make this change, it should have a test

comments.author: alanzhao1
comments.body:
> If people are going to be depending on this, we should have a test that this works as expected.



> if we care enough to make this change, it should have a test

Added a basic test. The test fails without this change (it reports no deleted instructions).
